positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed illustration of a celestial owl perched on a crystalline moonstone. The owl is depicted with majestic, sweeping feathers and glowing eyes, rendered in deep indigo and teal hues. The background features a cosmic nebula swirling with violets, golds, and magentas, interwoven with abstract geometric patterns, bioluminescent flora, and constellations. The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing a clean silhouette against the vibrant, high-contrast background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with sacred geometry and deep space fantasy. Intricate linework, volumetric lighting, ethereal mist effects. Minimalist, clean print aesthetic.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, blur, low detail, jpeg artifacts, cropped, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, extra limbs, deformed, disfigured, grainy
